revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''3-2-200

Diaphragm assembly (in an electrodynamic emitter)

An integral assembly comprising the diaphragm, moving coil, coil former, diaphragm suspension and attachments for mounting the assembly in the emitter.

{{IALAFooter}}
